pullMode.message: This GitHub proof does not create PULLS snapshots. It reads AWS EventBridge-generated 15-minute pull history from DynamoDB.

temporalFeatures.policy: Only timestamped observations at or before cutoffAtUtc are included.
Only timestamped observations at or before cutoffAtUtc are included.

predictions.reason: Single-game MLB moneyline pick ranked by de-vigged book probability, real bettable price, EV, edge, line movement, book agreement, reversals, and guardrails.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.note: Only downstream-gated official/actionable selections count toward the 90% target; every game still keeps a visible winner prediction.

fundamentalsLayer.message: No verified MLB fundamentals package matched this game. Market signal remains primary.

calibration.note: Calibration intentionally compresses aggressive raw scores toward market consensus and penalizes instability.

pickDiscipline.rule: Every game can receive a prediction, but only rows passing this gate are actionable picks.

winnerStackV2.policy: Every game receives a locked prediction; only actionablePick=true rows are primary picks.

rules: Each game locks independently 45 minutes before its own scheduled start.
The last valid pre-lock prediction promoted into immutable LOCKED#GAME storage is final.
Canonical rows are overlaid on public reads and are never recomputed.
Games before their cutoff without a valid canonical row remain explicitly pre-lock.
A missing canonical row at or after cutoff is an operational lock failure, never pre-lock or official.
The result is locked only after every manifest game has a canonical row.
The manifest is the independently stored full provider schedule, including games without supported odds.

reversal.auditUse: Compare count, density, and size proxy against eventual winning team after final score settlement.

directionalScoreV1.officialPolicy: premium_clean_market_only; validated ML may promote after this gate

directionalScoreV1.officialPolicy: premium_clean_market_only; validated ML may promote after this gate

fundamentalsSnapshot.sourceHonestyPolicy: Missing fundamentals remain explicitly missing and are never inferred from odds movement.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives a visible optimized winner prediction. A market-anchor fallback may change sides only when the candidate passes the same reversal, movement, market-confirmation, and score-margin flip gate as any other change. Official/actionable status remains downstream-gated.

balancedSignalGate.rule: Promote only market-backed rows with no hard block when the normal gate outputs zero.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Every MLB game keeps one visible platform winner pick; playable status remains separate.

mlOverlay.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
mlOverlay.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
rolling24hAccuracyTarget.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

accuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives a visible optimized winner prediction. A market-anchor fallback may change sides only when the candidate passes the same reversal, movement, market-confirmation, and score-margin flip gate as any other change. Official/actionable status remains downstream-gated.

balancedSignalGate.rule: Promote only market-backed rows with no hard block when the normal gate outputs zero.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Every MLB game keeps one visible platform winner pick; playable status remains separate.

mlOverlay.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
mlOverlay.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

accuracyTarget.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
accuracyTarget.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

calibrationPolicy.note: Probabilities are compressed toward market consensus and penalized for instability before the no-pick gate is applied.

mlOverlay.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
mlOverlay.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

winnerStackV2.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
winnerStackV2.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

rules: Each game locks independently 45 minutes before its own scheduled start.
The last valid pre-lock prediction promoted into immutable LOCKED#GAME storage is final.
Canonical rows are overlaid on public reads and are never recomputed.
Games before their cutoff without a valid canonical row remain explicitly pre-lock.
A missing canonical row at or after cutoff is an operational lock failure, never pre-lock or official.
The result is locked only after every manifest game has a canonical row.
The manifest is the independently stored full provider schedule, including games without supported odds.
Provider game id is the primary identity.
When provider id is unavailable, game key plus commence time is required.
Same-team doubleheaders must remain separate lock-manifest rows.
Only validated immutable LOCKED#GAME rows count as official locks.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Every MLB game keeps one visible platform winner pick; playable status remains separate.
signalPolicyV13.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
signalPolicyV13.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

directionalScoreV1.officialPolicy: premium clean market only; no forced official selection
directionalScoreV1.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
directionalScoreV1.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

predictionSemantics.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
predictionSemantics.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

mlOptimizationRuntime.safetyPolicy: Each authority requires its own promoted valid model; playability also requires a validation-selected reliability threshold.

rules: Provider game id is the primary identity.
When provider id is unavailable, game key plus commence time is required.
Same-team doubleheaders must remain separate lock-manifest rows.
Only validated immutable LOCKED#GAME rows count as official locks.

mlbLatestBuild.message: Built after 12 snapshots from top available ranked signals. Leg grades remain honest and are not promoted to strong.

results.message: Built after 12 snapshots from top available ranked signals. Leg grades remain honest and are not promoted to strong.

pullCoverage.policy: All active same-day sports should start timestamped pulls at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.
